w4ab1c23c15c15c27c19b7.CfnAbout: `Label` is a property of the [ParameterGroup](aws-properties-cloudformation-interface-parametergroup.md) and [ParameterLabel](aws-properties-cloudformation-interface-parameterlabel.md) properties that defines name for a parameter group or parameter.

w4ab1c23c15c15c27c19b7.default.Description: The default label that the CloudFormation console uses to name a parameter group or parameter.
